'''Zakrinand Minus''' was a notable [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] who lived just prior to the founding of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Minus participated in the [[Unification Wars (Galactic Republic)|Unification Wars]] that marked the establishment of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. During and after the conflict, he came to be regarded as near-invincible.<ref name="DOAE2">{{SW|url=news/the-imperial-warlords-despoilers-of-an-empire-part-2|series=The Imperial Warlords: Despoilers of an Empire|text=Part 2|nolive=1}}</ref>

===Legacy===
He was likened to other historical figures, like [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]] of the pre-Republic era and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], in terms of sheer barbarism.<ref name="GG:LOW" /> [[Kosh Teradoc]], a warlord of the Imperial Remnant after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], was known to compare himself to Minus, as well as [[Mandalore the First]]. Teradoc considered them, as well as himself, warlords guided by providence and sheer, brute strength.<ref name="DOAE2" />
